steps.t: The town of Entwade is to the north-east of Edoras.
The town of Underharrow is in Kingstead, to the south of Edoras. Éowyn has asked you to bring the news to Ellen Fremedon in Harrowdale that the people…
Horn is at the entrance to Underharrow, in Harrowdale. Horn has come with you to Underharrow, and he wishes to speak with you by the entrance to that …
Ellen Fremedon is in Underharrow, in Harrowdale.
Ordwald, the blacksmith of Underharrow, has a shop to the south of the Mead Hall. Ellen Fremedon has asked you to carry a heavy barrel of swords from …
Ordwald, the blacksmith of Underharrow, has a shop to the south of the Mead Hall. Ellen Fremedon has asked you to carry a heavy barrel of armour from …

Ellen Fremedon is outside the Mead Hall in Underharrow.
